promotionBlockers: Local pack assets exist, but GitHub Release upload/download-back evidence is still required.
Launcher lifecycle smoke must pass against these local assets and later against downloaded release assets.
Real gameplay evidence remains required before public alpha promotion.

residualRisks: The previous Galactic Survey version is a fixture-local manifest generated from current staged assets plus an older module placeholder; it proves pack update mechanics without claiming a second public release exists.
This smoke uses downloaded public prerelease GitHub assets; real gameplay evidence is still required before release-ready promotion.
Real gameplay evidence is still required before public alpha promotion.

The previous Galactic Survey version is a fixture-local manifest generated from current prerelease assets plus an older module placeholder; it proves launcher update mechanics without claiming a second public Galactic Survey release exists.

This script uses Launcher-owned resolver and lifecycle contracts from Node against downloaded GitHub prerelease assets; packaged Electron install/update/rollback/repair click-through is covered by release-readiness/galactic-survey-electron-ui-smoke.json.
Real gameplay evidence remains required before public alpha promotion.

blockers.message: Native launch was removed. Use Minecraft Launcher Handoff so the official launcher handles Microsoft login and play.
blockers.action: Use Play Ashfall to prepare the Minecraft Launcher profile and open the official launcher.

start.message: Native launch was removed. Use Minecraft Launcher Handoff so the official launcher handles Microsoft login and play.

firstLaunch.requiredPath: Minecraft Launcher Handoff or a real Native runtime launch command must pass before this can become first-launch proof.

phases.label: Check installed Galactic Survey Native Edition files
Check installed Galactic Survey Native Edition files

handoff.profileName: Galactic Survey Native Edition - Native Loader
warnings: Minecraft Launcher base version '26.1.2' metadata was missing. ECHO wrote it from Mojang metadata so assets can download.
Native Loader client library was missing. ECHO installed com/echo/native-loader/1.0.0/native-loader-1.0.0.jar into Minecraft Launcher libraries.
Minecraft Launcher Native Loader + Minecraft version metadata 'echo-galactic-survey-native-edition-native-loader-1.0.0' was missing. ECHO wrote it from the verified Ashfall release manifest.
handoff.message: Galactic Survey Native Edition Native Loader + Minecraft profile is ready in Minecraft Launcher; opening the launcher was skipped by prepare-only mode.

minecraftLauncherHandoff.limitation: Prepare-only evidence proves packaged launcher metadata handoff in an isolated Minecraft root. It is not gameplay or official Minecraft Launcher open/play evidence.

launcherRealMinecraftHandoffEvidence.limitation: This proves packaged ECHO Launcher installed Galactic Survey Native Edition and prepared an ECHO-managed Minecraft Launcher profile in the selected Minecraft root. It does not prove official launcher open/play or gameplay.

result.profileName: Galactic Survey Native Edition - Native Loader
warnings: Minecraft Launcher Native Loader + Minecraft version metadata 'echo-galactic-survey-native-edition-native-loader-1.0.0' was invalid (Native Loader pack addon 'addons/echocore-1.0.0.echo-addon' uses an unsupported file URL.). ECHO rewrote it from the verified Ashfall release manifest.

residualRisks: This harness executes compiled runtime services, not a visible player/client playthrough.
Manual first-30-minute, first-2-hour, Survey Array, fresh-world, save/reload, and no-crash evidence remains required.
Launcher install/update/repair/rollback evidence is owned by the Release Index launcher lifecycle reports.
